title: Vecter
description:
Keep Vecter Free

Vecter is and will always be 100% FREE. It's my hobby, my passion, and my gift to the world for everyone to enjoy, regardless of age, gender, location, race, wealth, or social status. 

If you truly enjoy Vecter and share these values, consider sharing it with others. As Vecter relies solely on word-of-mouth for growth, spreading the word is the best way to help. 

If you want to support development financially, you can grab a Donation Badge. These show up next to your name on the leaderboards so everyone knows you're one of the good ones. There are four tiers: 

• Vecter Supporter - Helped fuel the ship 

• Vecter Pilot - A true pilot of the grid 

• Speed Demon - Blazing through dimensions 

• Vecter Legend - An absolute legend of the void 

All proceeds go towards coffee and pizza to keep me going. Thanks for playing.

Об игреVecter is a fast-paced runner and shooter where your goal is to survive by the skin of your teeth and raise hell in your path. You get in your ship, you push the throttle on max, and then try to survive for as long as possible by annihilating anything that gets in your way. Don't blink.

Compete DailyEvery day there's a fresh leaderboard. Climb to the top and your name stays there forever. Not for a week. Not for a month. Forever. So if you're good, people will know.

Go GlobalThere's also global Steam leaderboards if daily competition isn't enough for you. Oh, and you'll see billboards in-game showing where top players died. It's a nice reminder that even the best eventually smack into something.

Multiple ModesTopDog, Hardcore, Speed Demon, Casual, or Training. Pick your poison. You can also share custom seeds with friends so you're racing the exact same track. No excuses.

Make It YoursFull RGB color customization, custom music support (drop your own MP3s, FLACs, or OGGs into a folder), and retro CRT effects if you're into that sort of thing. Your ship, your colors, your soundtrack.

YouTube IntegrationYeah, you can play YouTube videos right in the game. Use them as background music, or just have something playing while you dodge windmills at 10,000 km/h. It's your call.

30+ AchievementsFrom "first crash" (you'll get this one fast) to "escape velocity at 40,270 km/h" to "travel to the moon and back." Some are easy, some are... not.

Key Features• Procedurally generated endless tracks

• Daily and global Steam leaderboards

• 5 game modes with custom seed support

• Full RGB color scheme editor

• Custom music and YouTube playback

• Death billboards showing where top players died

• Unlockable ship upgrades

• 30+ Steam achievements

• Retro CRT and bloom effects

I'm a solo developer building this out of passion. Updates may be slow, but they happen when they happen. Thanks for playing.
description_short: Get in your ship, push the throttle to max, and try not to die. Daily leaderboards where your name stays forever if you're good enough. Custom colors, custom music, YouTube in-game. It's free. What are you waiting for?
